mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COALESCE(SUM(status = 10), 0) AS pending_count, COALESCE(SUM(status = 20), 0) AS processing_count, COALESCE(SUM(status = 30), 0) AS completed_count, COALESCE(SUM(status = 40), 0) AS returned_count FROM crm_work_order WHERE AND create_time BETWEEN #{times[0]} AND #{times[1]}
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM crm_work_order WHERE AND create_time BETWEEN #{times[0]} AND #{times[1]} GROUP BY status ORDER BY status
SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM crm_work_order WHERE AND create_time BETWEEN #{times[0]} AND #{times[1]} GROUP BY type ORDER BY type
SELECT handler_user_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM crm_work_order WHERE AND create_time BETWEEN #{times[0]} AND #{times[1]} GROUP BY handler_user_id ORDER BY count DESC, handler_user_id

SELECT time, SUM(created_count) AS created_count, SUM(completed_count) AS completed_count FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00') AS time, COUNT(*) AS created_count, 0 AS completed_count FROM crm_work_order WHERE AND create_time BETWEEN #{times[0]} AND #{times[1]} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00') UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(complete_time, '%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00') AS time, 0 AS created_count, COUNT(*) AS completed_count FROM crm_work_order WHERE AND complete_time IS NOT NULL AND complete_time BETWEEN #{times[0]} AND #{times[1]} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(complete_time, '%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00') ) trend GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
